source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) are internal consulting estimates. industry_sources entries indicate real published works that directionally support each lever's savings thesis. Specific percentages are not directly quoted from these sources.

levers.description: Consolidate sub-optimal branches; migrate footfall to digital + BC network.
industry_sources: RBI — Report on Trend and Progress of Banking in India 2023-24 (rbi.org.in/Scripts/AnnualReportPublications.aspx) — branch digitisation and BC network expansion data
IBA — Banking Technology Survey 2024 (iba.org.in/publications) — digital transaction share vs. branch transactions
McKinsey & Company — The Future of Bank Branches (mckinsey.com/industries/financial-services) — branch rationalisation savings benchmarks

levers.description: Automate customer due-diligence and transaction monitoring using RPA + ML models.
industry_sources: RBI — Master Direction on Know Your Customer (KYC) 2016, updated 2024 (rbi.org.in) — V-KYC regulatory framework
NASSCOM — AI in Banking: India Perspectives 2024 (nasscom.in/knowledge-center/publications) — automation adoption in KYC/AML
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — specific KYC automation savings range is an internal consulting estimate

levers.description: Eliminate legacy CBS instances; migrate to single-instance cloud CBS.
industry_sources: IBA — Banking Technology Survey 2024 (iba.org.in/publications) — core banking modernisation adoption rates
Gartner — IT Key Metrics Data: Banking Sector IT Spend 2024 (gartner.com/en/information-technology/insights/it-budget) — IT spend benchmarks for banks
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — CBS consolidation savings range is an internal consulting estimate; actual savings depend on legacy footprint size

levers.description: Consolidate overlapping fintech contracts; renegotiate multi-year terms.
industry_sources: Hackett Group — World-Class Performance Study Finance & Procurement Benchmarks 2024 (thehackettgroup.com/research/) — vendor consolidation savings ranges
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — fintech vendor renegotiation savings range is an internal consulting estimate calibrated to Indian banking sector

levers.description: Shift ATM ops to managed-service model; eliminate in-house cash replenishment.
industry_sources: RBI — Annual Report 2023-24 (rbi.org.in/Scripts/AnnualReportPublications.aspx) — ATM network data and managed services adoption trends in Indian banking
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — ATM managed services savings range is an internal consulting estimate

levers.description: Automate RBI/SEBI statutory returns; reduce manual effort in compliance teams.
industry_sources: RBI — Master Circular on Returns Submitted by Banks 2024 (rbi.org.in) — statutory reporting requirements
Ardent Partners — AP Metrics That Matter 2024 (ardentpartners.com/ap-metrics-that-matter-in-2025/) — process automation cost reduction benchmarks
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — specific regulatory reporting automation savings range is an internal consulting estimate for Indian banks
